title: Logo + Four Challenge-Coin Marks: Concept Rasters to Coin-Ready Vector Artwork with Black/White/Gold/Silver Variants
one_line_ask: Turn the client's five supplied concept rasters (one logo + four challenge-coin references) into clean, coin-ready vector marks, each delivered as transparent-PNG and SVG in black, white, gold, and silver.

issues: Visible JPEG-style compression artifacts and mild pixelation (acceptable for brief)
Slight tilt and uneven lighting (acceptable for brief)
Background is cluttered but fits the 'workshop' requirement
Paper is slightly wrinkled and dirty, but this fits the 'client-supplied mock-up' brief
Logo silhouette and wordmark are clear and legible
No real-world brands or trademarks visible
Slight paper wrinkle/crumple texture visible but within acceptable client-mock-up realism
Mild uneven lighting from overhead fluorescent creates slight luminance gradient across paper — acceptable per brief
Background tools (wrenches, sockets) are clearly visible and busy — correct per brief, not a flaw
Logo silhouette has mild pixelation consistent with raster mock-up requirement
No severe AI artifacts detected
No real-world trademarks or identifiable branded products visible
Deliberately low resolution and soft pixelated edges (per brief, not penalized)
No visible text present
Minor softness and slight pixelation on gear teeth and hammer handles (acceptable per brief)
Gear teeth at bottom-left and bottom-right show slight merging/softening where they meet the hammer handles — minor artifact acceptable at this resolution
The outer dashed ring segments are slightly uneven in arc length, particularly at the top gap
Hammer heads appear somewhat abstracted/simplified but remain readable as industrial hammers
Pixel edges are rough and low-res, but appropriate for a client reference/mockup.
Slight visible noise and off-white background as expected for a scanned-paper look.
Micro-text on banner is not present; only main motto text is visible.
Pixel/pixelated rendering is intentional per brief (low-res reference quality)
Eagle silhouette is slightly asymmetric between left and right wing spread — acceptable for source asset
Wrench in left talon and lightning bolt in right talon are clearly readable but slightly merged into body at low res — designer fix expected
Border rivets/bolts are uniform and well-spaced, minor pixel stairstepping on circular border — expected artifact
Slight blurriness and low resolution (acceptable per brief as a source/mockup)
Minor luminance noise and textured background (acceptable per brief)

Two anvils visible (one on left, one on right) rather than a single central anvil — likely an AI duplication artifact creating a mirrored pair, though still readable as a crossed-hammer-over-anvil emblem
Slight pixelation/blur consistent with low-res reference mock-up (acceptable per brief)
Hammer handles appear slightly thick/stubby but remain clearly identifiable
Rope border geometry is slightly uneven in stroke weight at a few points but acceptable for vectorizer reference
Visible aliasing and low resolution (acceptable per brief as client reference)
Minor export haloing at edges (acceptable per brief)
No visible text present
Tractor silhouette has visible pixel aliasing/jagged edges consistent with low-res raster source (intentional per brief)
Wheat wreath bottom crossing is slightly asymmetric
Minor pixelation on tractor cab window lines
Background gradient is very subtle but present as specified
